error_signature: workflow executes old version instead of updated nodes
title: Webhook triggers old workflow version
symptom: The webhook from Airtable executes the workflow, but the downstream nodes do not reflect the latest updates made in the editor.
applies_when: Changes made in the n8n editor
not_this_if: No changes were made in the editor
root_cause: The n8n editor requires users to publish changes to update the live version of the workflow. If changes are made but not published, the webhook will continue to execute the previous version of the workflow.
fix_steps: Make changes in the n8n editor
Click the 'Publish' button to apply changes
Trigger the webhook again from Airtable
agent_instruction: Ensure to click 'Publish' after making changes in the n8n editor to update the live workflow.
